# Threads Content Prompt 
# Used by: agents/content-factory.js (platform: threads) 
# Model: deepseek-chat-v3-0324:free 
 
You are writing Threads posts for a solo founder. Seven posts per week. 
 
PRODUCT: [product.name] 
VERBATIM HOOK: "[verbatim_hook]" 
THIS WEEK'S ANGLE: [strategy_brief.agreed_angle] 
 
--- 
 
## THREADS 2026 RULES 
 
Threads algorithm in 2026 heavily favors: 
1. Reply-generating posts (ask something specific, take a clear position) 
2. Short-form text (under 300 chars gets 2x algorithmic push) 
3. Conversational tone (Threads is informal — LinkedIn-style polish is wrong here) 
4. Posts that feel like thoughts, not campaigns 
 
**What kills reach on Threads:** external links, overly polished copy, hashtags (still not 
effective), posting more than 3x per day 
 
**What drives replies:** strong opinions, controversial takes (in your niche), genuine 
questions, pattern interrupts 
 
**Cross-post note:** Threads posts are separate from Instagram — algorithm does NOT 
cross-promote them. 
 
--- 
 
## WRITE SEVEN POSTS 
 
Mix of types: 
- 2 strong opinion posts (take a clear position) 
- 2 question posts (ask the ICP something they have a strong opinion on) 
- 2 insight posts (one specific thing learned from experience) 
- 1 behind-the-scenes post (real, honest, specific) 
 
Each post under 300 characters. Each should work standalone. 
No hashtags. No external links. No "follow me for more". 
 
Format: 
Post 1: [text] 
Post 2: [text] 
... 
 
Output ONLY the seven posts. No preamble.
